app.name: SideStack
app.description: A native Android app store for sideloaded apps. Browse, download, and install all SideStack apps from a single clean interface on your device.

features.title: App Store
features.description: Browse all available SideStack apps from a single native interface with clean app cards.

features.title: In-App Downloads
features.description: Download APKs directly within the app. Install prompt triggers automatically on completion.

features.title: Search
features.description: Filter apps by name, category, or description instantly as you type.

downloads.description: Works on all supported Android devices.
